pages.title: Cow Jam Farm puzzle
pages.description:
Match colorful tiles to harvest crops in a farm-themed puzzle setting where tile swapping drives progression through increasingly complex levels. Use strategic chaining of special crop tiles to clear the board and achieve set collection goals. The game challenges pattern recognition and puzzle-solving skills within a casual farming environment suitable for all ages.

Key Features

• Tile swapping crop matching  
• Strategic special tile chaining  
• Level-based puzzle objectives  
• Progressive difficulty scaling  
• Casual farming visual style

pages.title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
pages.description:
Arrange farm animals into matching groups by swapping tiles on a grid to clear the puzzle. The game challenges players with spatial reasoning through tile-matching mechanics set in a colorful farming environment. Levels increase in complexity by introducing timed moves and limited swaps to complete each stage under pressure.

Key Features

• Tile swapping grid puzzles  
• Strategic grouping mechanics  
• Progressive difficulty stages  
• Limited move challenges  
• Farm animal tile sets

pages.title: Sophie's Farm

Seasonal changes introduce new challenges that affect growth and harvest timing, pushing players to plan efficiently to sustain the farm.

• Crop rotation farming mechanic  
• Manual planting and harvesting controls
